This is the order accepted by Madhaveeya as well, vide

[If we divide day into 8, lord offrrst yama would be lord of
the day itself. The lordship of next yama should be ascribed
to the next vara lord, and thus in order for all other weekday
lords. Lord of frrst yama for a day would be lord of the 8th
yama as well. Similarly if we divide night into 8 yama
divisions, lord of the frrst yama at night would be lord of the
5th weekday from that day's week lord. In this way the
lordship of all 8 yamas in day and 8 yamas in night should be
determined]

26 Secrets o( Birth Time Rectification
The tabulated list of Y ama ownership for day time as per
these opinions is given below-
Table 1: Yama lords as per Parasara
